sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 86

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 86:1
items.html:
(to the question) Ibur of twelve and of nine months
The first Ibur is the discernment of the incorporation of NHY in HGT, which are six discernments. And there are these six discernments from AVI, and six discernments from AA, which are twelve discernments; and here the principal one is AA. And in the second Ibur there is the incorporation of NHY in HGT, and both of them in HBD — thus nine discernments; and here their principal is only from AVI. And "month" means the renewal of a discernment. These two Iburim are in the discernment of the exteriority of the Partzuf. (Item 24)
